headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on BXP, Lowers Price Target to $60
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains BXP (NYSE:BXP) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $67 to $60.
